name: vscode-ai-agent-assistant
description: VS Code assistant with full file context, related imports/tests, configurable LLM endpoint, and project actions.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.model.description: LLM model identifier used for agent responses.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.baseUrl.description: Full chat/completions endpoint URL for OpenRouter or another compatible provider.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.requestTimeo.description: LLM endpoint request timeout in milliseconds.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxImportedFile.description: Maximum number of imported files included in the prompt.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxTests.description: Maximum number of related test files included in the prompt.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxFileChars.description: Maximum characters loaded from each context file.

aiAgentAssistant.agent.maxIterations.description: Default maximum number of agent iterations before pause/continue is offered.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.requireConfir.description: Ask for confirmation before running shell commands or bash scripts.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.autoApplyFile.description: Apply LLM-proposed file changes immediately without opening a diff for approval.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.commandTimeou.description: Timeout for shell and bash execution tools in milliseconds.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.enabled.description: Enable QKV memory: lookup past similar diffs and inject predicted test failures before running real tests.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.topK.description: How many top similar past diffs to retrieve as predictions.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.storagePath.description: Custom path to the memory store JSON file. Empty means <workspace>/.aiAgentAssistant/memory/store.json.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.java.enabled.description: Enable Java enrichment: full method signatures, workspace call graph (callers/callees) for affected methods.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.java.bytecodePro.description: Whether to run javap on compiled classes to capture bytecode n-gram fingerprints. 'auto' = try if javap is in PATH; 'off' = disable; 'force' = require javap.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.java.classOutput.description: Workspace-relative paths where compiled .class files live. Empty means default Maven/Gradle/IntelliJ/Eclipse locations.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.enabled.description: After BM25 lexical match, rerank candidates using Jaccard similarity over affected methods, callers/callees, and bytecode n-grams.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.topN.description: How many BM25 candidates to consider in the reranking stage.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.weights.b.description: Weight of the normalized BM25 score in the combined reranking formula.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.weights.m.description: Weight of Jaccard over affected-method signatures.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.weights.c.description: Weight of Jaccard over union of callers and callees.

aiAgentAssistant.memory.rerank.weights.b.description: Weight of Jaccard over bytecode n-gram fingerprints.

scripts.validate: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/ui/AssistantViewProvider.js && node --check src/agent/AgentRuntime.js && node --check src/agent/ContextCollector.js && node --check src/agent/OpenRouterClient.js && node --check src/agent/ToolExecutor.js && node --check src/memory/MemoryManager.js && node --check src/memory/MemoryStore.js && node --check src/memory/BM25Index.js && node --check src/memory/DiffNormalizer.js && node --check src/memory/StackTraceParser.js && node --check src/memory/JavaSourceParser.js && node --check src/memory/JavaEnricher.js && node --check src/memory/BytecodeFingerprint.js && node --check src/memory/Reranker.js && node --check media/main.js
